meta.desc: อังกฤษแบบองค์กร — คำศัพท์ระดับองค์กรเต็มชุด

translations.home.title: PiKaOS
translations.home.subtitle: Kernel workspace — install plugins to add features.
translations.head.title: Sitemap Match
translations.head.desc: Match our sitemap vocabulary against terms on a web page — even when the wording differs but means the same.
translations.sitemap.notFound: No sitemap.xml found for this site
translations.sitemap.empty.title: No sitemap loaded
translations.sitemap.empty.sub: No sitemap.xml found — try the URL again
translations.log.title: 📜 Change log
translations.log.empty.title: No entries yet
translations.log.empty.sub: Adding/editing/removing terms · Excel · categories will be logged here with actor and time
translations.settings.engine.hint: how page terms are compared to the sitemap
translations.settings.useAi: Use AI to judge “unclear” terms (requires model + API configured)
translations.settings.bypass: 🚫 Auto-skip popups while fetching (cookie consent · modal/overlay · age gate · paywall · newsletter)
translations.settings.note: These values apply when AI Company is connected — saved ahead of time for now (mock)
translations.train.template.title: Download a training template
translations.train.export.title: Export this category's vocabulary as Excel
translations.train.readonly: 🔗 This category auto-combines {sources} — add/edit terms in the source categories
translations.map.title: 🗺️ Head term → variants (aliases)
translations.map.hint: No Excel needed — add/remove/edit terms here, saved as JSON for the AI to use right away
translations.addterm.thPh: Thai e.g. ราคาหลักทรัพย์
translations.map.empty: No terms yet — click “＋ Add term” or upload Excel
translations.scan.deepHint: (h2/h3 + all links · includes news — default is nav only)
translations.scan.noscan.title: No scan yet
translations.scan.noscan.sub: Pick a category, then enter a URL to match
translations.report.title: ④ Report — match summary
translations.bld.profile.label: Profile
translations.bld.profile.hint: Pick a card to load its settings + preset .md files
translations.bld.profile.lockedHint: 🔒 Agent CEO is locked — profiles can't overwrite it
translations.bld.profile.lockedNote: 🔒 Agent CEO is a fixed role — profiles can't overwrite it
translations.bld.profile.overMsg: A profile named “{name}” already exists — overwrite it?
translations.bld.ceo.resetMsg: Reset Agent CEO back to default? Your edits will be replaced.
translations.bld.lock.title: Locked
translations.bld.lock.msg: Agent CEO is locked — profiles can't be loaded over it
translations.bld.f.charHint: Pick the card that appears in the room
translations.bld.f.charLockedNote: 🔒 The character card is set by the administrator — not editable
translations.bld.f.name: Agent name
translations.bld.f.modelApiHint: 🔌 Uses the model from the chosen API
translations.bld.f.apiEmpty: No API yet — add one under
translations.bld.f.descPh: Describe who this agent is and what they're good at…
translations.bld.f.goalHint: What the agent holds as its north star
translations.bld.f.goalPh: e.g. Turn vague requests into clear, actionable plans
translations.bld.f.toolsHint: Calls tools · add/edit under Tools Manager (Admin)
translations.bld.f.wfHint: Automated job sets the agent can run
translations.bld.f.docsHint: Open full-page editor / download / add new file
translations.bld.f.coreHint: Every agent must have these — can't delete/edit
translations.bld.f.rulesHint: Applied when they don't conflict with core rules
translations.bld.f.statusNote: Starts as “idle” · the system updates it from real activity
translations.bld.preview.title: Card preview
translations.bld.preview.note: The sprite and color appear on the system map and every screen the moment you save
translations.bld.skill.delMsg: Remove skill "{name}" from the system? Agents carrying it will be unassigned too.
translations.bld.skill.bodyPh: SKILL.md — what it does / when to use / steps / limits / examples
translations.bld.core.note: 🛡️ Core rules bind every Agent — they always override other rules (on conflict, core wins)
translations.bld.gal.errIdle: At least one idle (standing) sheet is required
translations.bld.gal.errProcess: Couldn't process the image — must be a 5×8 sheet
translations.bld.gal.hint: Drop a 5×8 grid sprite sheet (40 frames) — it auto-trims/packs
translations.smrow.title: This page matched, but unclear
translations.smrow.noMatch: Not in the vocabulary yet — add it as a new term
translations.smrow.sectionSelect: Section (pick existing or type to create)
translations.smrow.sectionPh: Pick a section or type a new name e.g. About Us
translations.dup.title: Duplicate term
translations.smrow.aliasPh: e.g. awards, hall of fame, รางวัล
translations.section.rename.title: Rename section
translations.section.delete.title: Delete section
translations.section.delete.msg: Delete “{name}” and all {n} terms inside it? This cannot be undone.
translations.confirm.removeTerm.title: Delete term
translations.confirm.removeTerm.msg: Delete term “{canon}” and all its mapped words?
translations.confirm.removeAlias.title: Delete mapped word
translations.confirm.deleteCat.title: Delete category
translations.confirm.deleteCat.msg: Delete category “{cat}”? All its sections and terms will be removed.
translations.confirm.removeTrain.title: Delete training file
translations.confirm.clearLog.title: Clear activity log
translations.modal.title: ＋ Add term
translations.prompt.addTerm: Add head term — e.g. Share Price
translations.prompt.addTermTh: Description / Thai — e.g. ราคาหลักทรัพย์
translations.prompt.addAlias: Add a mapped term — e.g. balance sheet
translations.prompt.deleteCat: Delete “{cat}”? Its terms will be removed too
translations.edit.canon.title: Edit head term
translations.edit.desc.title: Edit description / Thai
translations.edit.alias.title: Edit mapped word
translations.add.canon.title: Add head term
translations.add.canon.ph: e.g. Share Price / ราคาหลักทรัพย์
translations.add.desc.title: Description / Thai
translations.add.desc.ph: e.g. ราคาหลักทรัพย์
translations.addAlias.title: Add mapped word
translations.removeCanon.title: Delete head term
translations.deleteCat.usedBy: Category “{key}” is combined into: {list} — delete those combined categories first
translations.deleteCat.title: Delete category
translations.deleteCat.msg: Delete category “{key}”? Its terms / mappings will be removed too
translations.item.addVocab.title: Add “{term}” as a word for {canon} and treat it as matched
translations.mkt.title: Marketplace
translations.mkt.pagedesc: Browse & add packages from the catalog.
translations.mkt.tabdesc.localmcp: Run MCP servers on your own machine — local tools that can access your computer (desktop app only).
translations.mkt.tabdesc.onlinemcp: Connect to hosted MCP services over the network.
translations.connect.title: Connect to your server
translations.connect.subtitle: Enter the address of your {name} server — for example 192.168.1.50:8000 or https://your-server.example
translations.connect.warnHttp: Unencrypted connection (http) — use only on a trusted network.
translations.connect.errInvalid: That address is not a valid URL or IP.
translations.connect.errHttp: Plain http is allowed only for local, LAN, or VPN addresses — use https for public servers.
translations.connect.errUnreachable: Cannot reach a server at this address.
translations.connect.errSave: Connected, but saving the server failed — check the desktop logs.
translations.connect.errDelete: Could not remove that server — try again.
translations.recovery.title: Check & repair this device
translations.recovery.subtitle: Health of everything this app stores on this machine. Repair clears crash state and keeps the item installed; uninstall removes it.
translations.recovery.failed: Action failed — see the desktop log.
translations.recovery.corruptNote: File unreadable — repairing recreates an empty one; old entries cannot be recovered.
translations.recovery.mcp.title: MCP servers
translations.recovery.mcp.desc: Locally installed MCP modules. Repair stops a stuck one and re-asks consent next start; uninstall removes its definition.
translations.recovery.item.mcp-approvals.desc: Clearing re-asks consent the next time each MCP server starts.
translations.recovery.item.boot-cache.desc: Per-server build stamps. Clearing re-runs the start-up splash — fixes a stuck loading screen.
translations.recovery.item.ui-state.desc: Theme, language, menu arrangement and drafts on this device. Clearing returns the UI to defaults.
translations.recovery.item.http-cache.desc: Downloaded assets. Clearing makes the next load slower once.
translations.recovery.danger.title: Danger Zone
translations.recovery.danger.note: These remove saved credentials or servers. Type {token} to enable the buttons.
translations.recovery.item.secrets.desc: Clearing signs this device out of every server — you will log in again everywhere.
translations.recovery.item.backend-config.desc: Clearing forgets every saved server — back to an empty connect screen.
translations.recovery.factory.desc: Everything above in one click. This device starts as freshly installed.

translations.brand.name: PiKaOs
translations.viewas.hint: Preview the app exactly as another member sees it
translations.login.title: Sign in
translations.login.reset.title: Reset password
translations.login.forgot.noteC: and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
translations.login.err.invalid: Invalid credentials. Please check and try again.
translations.login.err.network: Can't reach the server. Check your connection and try again.
translations.login.err.server: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again.
translations.login.sent.title: Check your inbox
translations.login.sent.sub2: we've sent a password reset link.
translations.login.val.emailBad: That email address doesn't look right
translations.login.val.userShort: Username must be at least 3 characters
translations.login.val.pwShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
translations.hall.title: Overview
translations.hall.desc: An overview of your agents' work — the council is powered by Orchestrator
translations.hall.help: Quick guide: 🟢 Connected to real AI = actually works (Orchestrator chat in World State, Recall) · 💾 Saved locally = data stored on device (agents, map, knowledge) · ◌ Demo = numbers/chat for show only, no effect
translations.hall.empty.roster: No agents in the system yet
translations.hall.empty.rosterSub: Create your first agent — set name, role, skills and rules
translations.alerts.mana.title: Tokens near daily cap
translations.alerts.failed.title: Tasks failed
translations.alerts.queued.title: Tasks waiting to start
translations.alerts.review.title: Awaiting review
translations.alerts.away.title: Agents not ready
translations.floor.empty: The tower is empty — summon agents to staff it
translations.agents.title: All agents
translations.agents.desc: Your system's AI agent team — create and define each one's name, role, skills and rules
translations.agents.help: Characters you create are saved for real and appear on the world map · name/role/skills/rules are character profiles — not yet wired to a real AI
translations.agents.empty: No agents in the system yet
translations.agents.emptySub: Create your first agent — set name, role, skills and rules, or start from the sample set
translations.tools.title: Manage Tools
translations.tools.desc: System-level arrangement, shared by everyone. Installed plugins add their own settings panels here.
translations.tools.help: Each tool has its own type + settings (MCP · LINE OA · Telegram · CMD/PowerShell · HTTP API · Webhook · Database · Email) — turn off the switch to hide it from the agent builder without deleting it
translations.tools.emptySub: Click 'Add tool' to create the first one
translations.tools.addPosPh: Add a new position e.g. Analyst
translations.tools.skillMdPh: What this skill does and when to use it…
translations.tools.delSkillMsg: Delete skill “{name}”? Agents using it will lose it.
translations.tools.delToolMsg: Remove "{name}" from the system? Agents using it will have this tool detached
translations.toolform.name: Tool name
translations.pw.title: Change password
translations.pw.errShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
translations.profile.title: Account
translations.profile.name: Display name
translations.notif.title: Notifications
translations.notif.plugin.updated: Plugin {plugin} updated to {tag} — restart to apply
translations.meeting.title: Agent Council
translations.meeting.desc: A real-time system council — all agents coordinate under Orchestrator's lead
translations.meeting.help: The chat here is a scripted demo for atmosphere, not wired to a real AI yet — to talk to a real AI go to 'World State' or 'Recall'
translations.ad.delMsg: Remove {name} from the roster? (The profile is kept and can be restored later.)
translations.ad.ceoLocked: 👔 Agent CEO is a fixed role — can't be deleted by anyone (including admins)
translations.ad.ceoLockedAlert: Agent CEO is a fixed role and can't be deleted by anyone (including the administrator)
translations.qb.title: Quest board
translations.qb.desc: Assign and track every agent's work — set the responsible room, priority and status
translations.qb.recallTitle: Pull the task back to continue
translations.qb.openTitle: Open task — view details and the AI worklog
translations.qb.empty.trashSub: Deleted tasks rest here first — restorable
translations.qb.create.title: Create a new quest
translations.qb.f.name: Task name
translations.qb.edit.title: Edit task
translations.qb.bumpedNote: This task was bumped to the front — priority is set to 'Top priority' and locked
translations.qb.queueNote: Queue and time follow the real task order — not editable; the AI runs by queue
translations.qb.finishMsgDone: Task “{title}” completed all {step}/{total} steps — confirm closing it?
translations.qb.finishMsgEarly: Task “{title}” isn't done — currently at {step}/{total} steps. Close it early?
translations.qb.warnDone: Press confirm again to close this task
translations.qb.warnEarly: The AI isn't finished ({step}/{total}) — closing now stops the pending work. Press confirm again to close
translations.qb.creatingMsg: Orchestrator is issuing the code and preparing the task room
translations.qb.softDelMsg: Move task “{title}” to trash? All files are kept — restorable later
translations.qb.purgeMsg: Delete task “{title}” permanently? Both .md files{room} will be lost — can't be undone
translations.qb.purgeRoomFrag: and the room bound to it
translations.ri.head: 🏠 Room info — linked to a task
translations.ri.noLink: This room isn't linked to a task yet — create a task on the board, then pick or create this room
translations.rx.head: 📤 Files the AI exported — Excel · JSON · CSV · etc.
translations.rx.empty: No exported files yet — tap 'Simulate AI export'
translations.rs.head: 🗂 Room sessions — a log of each work round
translations.rs.empty: No sessions yet — tap 'Save this session'
translations.rfile.PERSONA.md.d: One voice across the team — keeps outputs consistent
translations.rfile.WORKFLOW.md.d: Each agent knows where it sits in the work
translations.rfile.GLOSSARY.md.d: Same terms across the team — fewer hallucinations
translations.rfile.SKILL.md.d: Each agent can do something different
translations.rfile.TOOLS.md.d: No need to know tools it doesn't use
translations.mana.title: Tokens
translations.mana.desc: The energy that drives every agent — track token usage and how it's allocated across roles
translations.mana.capacityNote: Estimated to last ~26 more hours of pending work at the current burn rate
translations.mana.noUsageSub: Create an agent to start tracking usage
translations.treasury.title: Treasury
translations.treasury.desc: Rewards the team has accrued from completed tasks — credits and artifacts earned along the way
translations.chronicle.title: Activity stats
translations.chronicle.desc: A chronicle of the team's output — completed tasks, success rate, and weekly trends
translations.chronicle.noRankSub: Create an agent to start recording stats
translations.storage.title: Storage
translations.storage.hint: Where files (documents/images/logs) are stored — configured in .env; supports MinIO or AWS S3 (S3-compatible)
translations.storage.envNote: 🔒 access/secret keys live in .env only (bootstrap) — not editable from the UI, by security policy
translations.qlog.title: Task history
translations.qlog.desc: A record of all the team's tasks — completed and in progress
translations.watch.title: Monitoring
translations.watch.desc: Health status of the team and the systems behind it — alerts when something's off
translations.set.title: Settings
translations.set.desc: Choose your display theme and vocabulary independently — changes apply instantly and are remembered on this device.
translations.set.scanNote: Scanned from data/i18n/*.json — 1 file = 1 language + 1 vocabulary style · add new files without touching code
translations.pkg.git.title: Install from a Git URL
translations.pkg.cred.title: Private repo credentials
translations.api.title: API connections
translations.api.desc: Add your AI provider API keys with a memorable name — the list shows only the name and the key's last digits (stored on this device)
translations.utilitybar.notifications.title: Notifications
translations.utilitybar.add.title: Create new
translations.ai.title: AI Console
translations.ai.empty: Ask the AI — it can use this system's tools.
translations.ai.setup.title: Connect your AI
translations.ai.setup.hint: Your API key is stored encrypted on this machine only — it never reaches the server.
translations.ai.setup.baseUrlHint: Full chat-completions URL of your local server.
translations.ai.setup.modelHint: Optional — some local servers (e.g. vLLM) require the exact served model name.
translations.ai.setup.keyOptional: API key — optional for a local server (leave blank if none).
translations.ai.error.generic: Something went wrong — check the key and try again.
translations.ai.mode.adminHint: The Administrator configured this AI. Your messages use the organization's self-hosted model — no key is needed on this machine.
translations.ai.mode.adminUnavailable: The managed AI is unavailable — the AI plugin is not installed, or your account lacks permission to use it.
translations.mcp.title: Local MCP Servers
translations.mcp.desc: Manage MCP servers that run as local child processes on this machine. Starting one for the first time (or after its command/args change) asks for your consent.
translations.mcp.add.help: Register a local MCP server. The first start (or any change to its command/args) asks for your consent.
translations.mcp.empty.title: No MCP servers registered
translations.mcp.empty.sub: Pick one of the ready-made servers above to get started.
translations.mcp.tools.title: Tools
translations.mcp.preset.title: Ready-made servers
translations.mcp.preset.custom.name: Custom
translations.mcp.preset.custom.desc: For technical users — enter the command and arguments yourself.
translations.mcp.preset.filesystem.name: Files in a folder
translations.mcp.preset.filesystem.desc: Lets the AI read and write files inside one folder you choose.
translations.mcp.preset.memory.name: Memory
translations.mcp.preset.memory.desc: Lets the AI remember facts between conversations.
translations.mcp.preset.sequential-thinking.name: Step-by-step thinking
translations.mcp.preset.sequential-thinking.desc: Helps the AI break hard problems into steps.
translations.mcp.preset.everything.name: Test server
translations.mcp.preset.everything.desc: A demo server with sample tools — useful to check the system works.
translations.mcp.explain.title: What is a local MCP server?
translations.mcp.explain.body: An MCP server is a small helper program that runs on this computer and gives the AI extra abilities — reading files in a folder you choose, remembering things between conversations, and more. Pick a ready-made server below and PiKaOs sets it up for you. The first time each one starts, you will be asked to allow it.
translations.mcp.err.node-missing: Node.js is not installed on this computer — the ready-made servers need it. Install it from nodejs.org, then try again.
translations.mcp.err.spawn-failed: PiKaOs could not start this server. Check the command and the arguments, then try again.
translations.mcp.err.handshake-timeout: The server started but did not answer in time. Try starting it again.
translations.mcp.err.handshake-failed: The server started but did not answer the way an MCP server should, so PiKaOs cannot use it.
translations.mcp.err.exited-early: The server stopped by itself right after starting. Its settings may be wrong.
translations.mcp.err.generic: Something went wrong with this server.
translations.mcp.confirm.delete.title: Remove this server?
translations.mcp.confirm.delete.msg: It will be stopped and removed from your list. You can install it again at any time.
